items.title: Police officer catches baby dropped from window of burning home
items.dek: Body cam footage shows the moment a baby was thrown from a window and caught by an officer during a house fire.
items.body: Body cam footage shows the moment a baby was thrown from a window and caught by an officer during a house fire.

items.title: Xi basks in spotlight as he hosts Putin days after Trump
items.dek: Two presidential visits days apart is how Xi Jinping wants the world to see him: talking to everyone, tied to no-one.
items.body: Two presidential visits days apart is how Xi Jinping wants the world to see him: talking to everyone, tied to no-one.
items.author: IriLine Desk
